name: Worker Execution
summary: Compiles and validates bounded provider-neutral Worker Execution values without scheduling workers or deciding whether their output is acceptable.

invariants: Work Specifications, Context Expansion Requests, Worker Reports, and Execution Records are closed, schema-versioned, bounded, canonical values with reproducible content digests.

Execution events form one append-only sequence bound to the exact Work Specification and prior Execution Record digest; conflicting replay, reordering, cross-execution reuse, and post-terminal append fail closed.
A Context Expansion Request records only a request and cannot grant scope, replace a Context Capsule, or claim recomputed impact.

Requested capabilities, declared control mode, and observed enforcement remain separate facts; this Module cannot construct an enforced capability fact without a future compiler-authenticated controller product.

Worker Reports and Execution Records are non-authoritative observations and cannot contain Evidence, Knowledge Closure, an Authority Decision, acceptance, Claim satisfaction, or aggregate assurance semantics.
Provider, model, session, transcript, message, tool-call, source-body, stdout, stderr, and open extension payloads do not cross the Worker Execution Interface.
